span.p:
golang:1.23-alpine
go mod download
go build -ldflags='-s -w'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
alpine:3.20
COPY server, migrate
COPY static, migrations
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ./server
